TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ba-lan-si-s-kePiy-sa-low, title = Ba-lan-si-s-kePiy-sa-low, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ba-lan-si-s-kePiy-sa-low} }

S.FORM: == kakilimad == Ba-lan-si-s-ke.Piy-sa-low "kamu nu Si-pan-ya, Francisco Pizarro, pabelin aca tu ngangan, 1471 a mihcaan anucaay 1476 a mihcaan-1541 a mihca 6 a bulad 26 a demiad" u saayaway nu midebungan nu Si-pan-ya, mibuhat tu Si-pan-ya midemec tu Nan-mey-cow "micidekay sa nu Mi-lu" a ziday, nu ayzaay Mi-lu kahenulan a kitizaan Li-ma nu patizengay. i Si-pan-ya a nazipaan, ci Pi-sa-low pidemecan a kawaw atu mu-si-keay nu midemecay ci Ay-al-te-s malecad ku singangan. masakapahay a nikauzip Pi-sa-low lecuh i ayzaay a Si-pan-ya Ay-s-te-lye-ma-tu-la a kuwan nu adidi'ay a niyazu' Te-lu-si-lye "Trujillo", itawya Si-pan-ya ayaw nu nipapulung, u wama ci Kung-sa-Pi-sa-low.Low‚ÄĒte-li-ke-s.te.A-kuw-la "Gonzalo Pizarro Rodr√≠guez de Aguilar" u sakakaay nu muculilay a hitay, namikilul ci Bey-al-nan-te-s.te-ke-to-hwa atu milihiza tu nu I-ta-lai a kalalais, na i Na-wa-la a malalais, a sikawlah tu nikalalaisan. (Trujillo), (Gonzalo Pizarro Rodr√≠guez de Aguilar) . u bucud a wawa ci Pi-al-low, nisulitan cinizaan tu wawanay a mihcaan caay kayadah, katinengan wawana nikauzip niza mangelu' pakuyuc', asaca caay ka picudad, maliyuh misulit. i 1500 a ziday tu saayaway, ci Pi-sa-low naitiza i Say-wi-yw, zikuz mikaput tu Si-pan-ya nu mitahaway i bayu nu sakaput a balunga, kinapinaay tu mikawaw tu mitahaway, nabatad pabalunga' tayza i Si-ing-tu kasadipas a subal nu I-s-pa-ni-aw-la a subal, 1510 a mihcaan hawsa, sakukamu ciniza aci A-long-su.Te.Aw-he-ta namakay S-s-pan-niw-la a subal natayza i Urab. Urab. Pi-sa-low mikilul ci Pa-s-ke.ni-nye-c.Te-Pa-al-pow mapulung mitahaw tu satipbayu a liwliw nu subal, i Pa-na-ma mana'nel, mala malukay nu pahabanay tu katalalan. 1522 a mihcaan, cuniza atu kiwkay a siw-s ci Ay-al-nan-to.te.Lu-ke atu hitay ci Ti-ya-ke.te.A-ma-ke-low makakadum, makay Pa-na-ma tatimul mikilim tu yadahay a lala' nu midebungay, tatulu ku heni palalecad tu lala', sakapah sa micalap matatelek zikuz, malingatu sibalucu' makay bayu micumud tawyaay a liwliw nu In-Cya ti-kow. . i teban nu zazan miala misaupu tu sabaw tulu nu miladayay, pinaay ku nipalawpes tu bulad demiad, micakay tu subayu, kakaen atu kuwang, masaupu i ayzaay a Ke-lun-pi-ya satip a dadipasan nayay ku tademaw a subal, nayi' ku patiyamay, nayi' ku balunga, palatatenga' ci Pi-sa-low cinizaan namiduduc tu dadipasan a zazan pabalunga, micaliway tu In-Cya ti-kow a lala'. . yu taluma' i Pa-na-ma ciniza hawsa, Pa-na-ma a Cow-cang pasaicelang cinizaan a palalid mitahaw, pabeli cinizaan tu sayadahay a hitay atu subayu miazih tu zazan, 1528 a mihcaan tu kalalud, ci Pa-sa-low makay Pa-na-ma mumul, kalaludan taluma' i Say-wi-ya. itawya i Si-pang-ya-to-le-to a sen-sen-Low-ma-ti-kow hungti ci Ca-al sakalima lasubu a hungti sakay ci P-sa-lowan tu nitayzaan manamuhay, i 1529 a mihca 7 a bulad 26 a demiad macacudad a sitatungus a mademec ku Ing-Cya ti-kow. 1532 a mihcaan ci Pi-sa-low atu ciniza tu cayay ka katukuh tu tusa a lasubu nu adidi'ay sakaput a hitay tatimul, i zazanan paanin tu adidi'ay a tuud misulup a palatatenga' ku In-ti-an. 11 a bulad 16 a demiad tayni tu i Mi-lu nu saamisanay a Ka-ha-ka, tini i In-Cya a biyu miazih tu nipakaala nu cekakaan tu nipademecan nu In-cya a hungti ci A-ta-uw-al-pa, culculen niza ci A-al-nan-tu.te.Su-to, siw-s-wwon-sen-te-te-Ba-al-bu-te atu tizaay nu pabelinay ci Bey-li-pi-low tayza miazih tu hungti, anucaay sa a kasenun miliyas kuheni, In-cya a hungti caay ku mikilulay tu cimacimaan a tademaw. ŚĺĀśúćŚćįŚä† In-cya a hungti mataneng ku balucu' lalekalan i kalalaisan tu walu malebut a hitay nu In-cya, ni Pi-ce-low a hitay muculilay 106 dada' atu 62 nu cisubayuay a hitay, zikuz milais ci Pi-ce-low, Ka-ha-ma-ka milalais mademec tusa a malebut ku nisubelidan a kudih nu In-cya, mazakepay Ing-cya a hungti, atu hita 12 ku miadingay nu tademaw patayen tu. 1538 a mihcaan, u nikakilac tu nialawan a munday, nikelidan a hitay ni Pi-sa-low malawlaw ku lalabuay, azihan atu sakadum niza kacacayat a hitay ci Ti-ya-ke.te-A-ma-ke-low malingatu milalais cinizaan, itawya i Ute a tukay, mademec niza ci A-ma-ke-low, nika 1541 a mihca 6 a bulad 26 a demiad, i Li-ma a niyazu'an ciniza mapacuk nu mikilulay ni A-ma-ke-low. 1538ŚĻī, ,Áē∂śôāŚú®UteŚüé, . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺimad == ba-r~…ĺan-si-s-k…ô.pij-sa-r~…ĺow "kamu nu si-pan-ja, fran ¶is ¶o pizarro, pab…ôr~…ĺin a ¶a tu ŇčaŇčan, **** a mińß ¶aan anu ¶aaj **** a mińß ¶aan-**** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad" u saajawaj nu mid…ôbuŇčan nu si-pan-ja, mibuńßat tu si-pan-ja mid…ôm…ô ¶ tu nan-m…ô- ¶ow "mi ¶id…ôkaj sa nu mi-r~…ĺu" a zidaj, nu ajzaaj mi-r~…ĺu kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kitizaan r~…ĺi-ma nu patiz…ôŇčaj. i si-pan-ja a nazipaan, ¶i pi-sa-r~…ĺow pid…ôm…ô ¶an a kawaw atu mu-si-k…ôaj nu mid…ôm…ô ¶aj ¶i aj-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-s mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku siŇčaŇčan. masakapańßaj a nikauzip pi-sa-r~…ĺow r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i ajzaaj a si-pan-ja aj-s-t…ô-r~…ĺj…ô-ma-tu-r~…ĺa a kuwan nu adidi Ē~ °aj a nijazu Ē~ ° t…ô-r~…ĺu-si-r~…ĺj…ô "trujir~…ĺr~…ĺo", itawja si-pan-ja ajaw nu nipapur~…ĺuŇč, u wama ¶i kuŇč-sa-pi-sa-r~…ĺow.r~…ĺow*t…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ô-s.t…ô.a-kuw-r~…ĺa "gonzar~…ĺo pizarro *odr*gu…ôz d…ô aguir~…ĺar" u sakakaaj nu mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a ńßitaj, namikir~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶i b…ô-ar~…ĺ-nan-t…ô-s.t…ô-k…ô-to-ńßwa atu mir~…ĺińßiza tu nu i-ta-r~…ĺai a kar~…ĺar~…ĺais, na i na-wa-r~…ĺa a mar~…ĺar~…ĺais, a sikawr~…ĺańß tu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺaisan. (trujir~…ĺr~…ĺo), (gonzar~…ĺo pizarro *odr*gu…ôz d…ô aguir~…ĺar) . u bu ¶ud a wawa ¶i pi-ar~…ĺ-r~…ĺow, nisur~…ĺitan ¶inizaan tu wawanaj a mińß ¶aan ¶aaj kajadańß, katin…ôŇčan wawana nikauzip niza maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° pakuju ¶ Ē~ °, asa ¶a ¶aaj ka pi ¶udad, mar~…ĺijuńß misur~…ĺit. i **** a zidaj tu saajawaj, ¶i pi-sa-r~…ĺow naitiza i saj-wi-jw, zikuz mikaput tu si-pan-ja nu mitańßawaj i baju nu sakaput a bar~…ĺuŇča, kinapinaaj tu mikawaw tu mitańßawaj, nabatad pabar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ ° tajza i si-iŇč-tu kasadipas a subar~…ĺ nu i-s-pa-ni-aw-r~…ĺa a subar~…ĺ, **** a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa, sakukamu ¶iniza a ¶i a-r~…ĺoŇč-su.t…ô.aw-ńß…ô-ta namakaj s-s-pan-niw-r~…ĺa a subar~…ĺ natajza i urab. urab. pi-sa-r~…ĺow mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶i pa-s-k…ô.ni-nj…ô- ¶.t…ô-pa-ar~…ĺ-pow mapur~…ĺuŇč mitańßaw tu satipbaju a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu subar~…ĺ, i pa-na-ma mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺ, mar~…ĺa mar~…ĺukaj nu pańßabanaj tu katar~…ĺar~…ĺan. **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶uniza atu kiwkaj a siw-s ¶i aj-ar~…ĺ-nan-to.t…ô.r~…ĺu-k…ô atu ńßitaj ¶i ti-ja-k…ô.t…ô.a-ma-k…ô-r~…ĺow makakadum, makaj pa-na-ma tatimur~…ĺ mikir~…ĺim tu jadańßaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu mid…ôbuŇčaj, tatur~…ĺu ku ńß…ôni par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, sakapańß sa mi ¶ar~…ĺap matat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk zikuz, mar~…ĺiŇčatu sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° makaj baju mi ¶umud tawjaaj a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu in- ¶ja ti-kow. . i t…ôban nu zazan miar~…ĺa misaupu tu sabaw tur~…ĺu nu mir~…ĺadajaj, pinaaj ku nipar~…ĺawp…ôs tu bur~…ĺad d…ômiad, mi ¶akaj tu subaju, kaka…ôn atu kuwaŇč, masaupu i ajzaaj a k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja satip a dadipasan najaj ku tad…ômaw a subar~…ĺ, naji Ē~ ° ku patijamaj, naji Ē~ ° ku bar~…ĺuŇča, par~…ĺatat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ¶i pi-sa-r~…ĺow ¶inizaan namidudu ¶ tu dadipasan a zazan pabar~…ĺuŇča, mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu in- ¶ja ti-kow a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. . ju tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i pa-na-ma ¶iniza ńßawsa, pa-na-ma a ¶ow- ¶aŇč pasai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶inizaan a par~…ĺar~…ĺid mitańßaw, pab…ôr~…ĺi ¶inizaan tu sajadańßaj a ńßitaj atu subaju miazińß tu zazan, **** a mińß ¶aan tu kar~…ĺar~…ĺud, ¶i pa-sa-r~…ĺow makaj pa-na-ma mumur~…ĺ, kar~…ĺar~…ĺudan tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i saj-wi-ja. itawja i si-paŇč-ja-to-r~…ĺ…ô-to a s…ôn-s…ôn-r~…ĺow-ma-ti-kow ńßuŇčti ¶i ¶a-ar~…ĺ sakar~…ĺima r~…ĺasubu a ńßuŇčti sakaj ¶i p-sa-r~…ĺowan tu nitajzaan manamuńßaj, i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad ma ¶a ¶udad a sitatuŇčus a mad…ôm…ô ¶ ku iŇč- ¶ja ti-kow. **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i pi-sa-r~…ĺow atu ¶iniza tu ¶ajaj ka katukuńß tu tusa a r~…ĺasubu nu adidi Ē~ °aj sakaput a ńßitaj tatimur~…ĺ, i zazanan paanin tu adidi Ē~ °aj a tuud misur~…ĺup a par~…ĺatat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ku in-ti-an. ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad tajni tu i mi-r~…ĺu nu saamisanaj a ka-ńßa-ka, tini i in- ¶ja a biju miazińß tu nipakaar~…ĺa nu ¶…ôkakaan tu nipad…ôm…ô ¶an nu in- ¶ja a ńßuŇčti ¶i a-ta-uw-ar~…ĺ-pa, ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ…ôn niza ¶i a-ar~…ĺ-nan-tu.t…ô.su-to, siw-s-wwon-s…ôn-t…ô-t…ô-ba-ar~…ĺ-bu-t…ô atu tizaaj nu pab…ôr~…ĺinaj ¶i b…ô-r~…ĺi-pi-r~…ĺow tajza miazińß tu ńßuŇčti, anu ¶aaj sa a kas…ônun mir~…ĺijas kuńß…ôni, in- ¶ja a ńßuŇčti ¶aaj ku mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj tu ¶ima ¶imaan a tad…ômaw. **** in- ¶ja a ńßuŇčti matan…ôŇč ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan i kar~…ĺar~…ĺaisan tu war~…ĺu mar~…ĺ…ôbut a ńßitaj nu in- ¶ja, ni pi- ¶…ô-r~…ĺow a ńßitaj mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj *** dada Ē~ ° atu ** nu ¶isubajuaj a ńßitaj, zikuz mir~…ĺais ¶i pi- ¶…ô-r~…ĺow, ka-ńßa-ma-ka mir~…ĺar~…ĺais mad…ôm…ô ¶ tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a kudińß nu in- ¶ja, mazak…ôpaj iŇč- ¶ja a ńßuŇčti, atu ńßita ** ku miadiŇčaj nu tad…ômaw pataj…ôn tu. **** a mińß ¶aan, u nikakir~…ĺa ¶ tu niar~…ĺawan a mundaj, nik…ôr~…ĺidan a ńßitaj ni pi-sa-r~…ĺow mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺabuaj, azińßan atu sakadum niza ka ¶a ¶ajat a ńßitaj ¶i ti-ja-k…ô.t…ô-a-ma-k…ô-r~…ĺow mar~…ĺiŇčatu mir~…ĺar~…ĺais ¶inizaan, itawja i ut…ô a tukaj, mad…ôm…ô ¶ niza ¶i a-ma-k…ô-r~…ĺow, nika **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, i r~…ĺi-ma a nijazu Ē~ °an ¶iniza mapa ¶uk nu mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj ni a-ma-k…ô-r~…ĺow. *****, ,***ut…ô*, . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakilimad == Ba-lan-si-s-ke.Piy-sa-low "kamu nu Si-pan-ya, Francisco Pizarro, pabelin aca tu ngangan, 1471 a mihcaan anucaay 1476 a mihcaan-1541 a mihca 6 a bulad 26 a demiad" u saayaway nu midebungan nu Si-pan-ya, mibuhat tu Si-pan-ya midemec tu Nan-mey-cow "micidekay sa nu Mi-lu" a ziday, nu ayzaay Mi-lu kahenulan a kitizaan Li-ma nu patizengay. i Si-pan-ya a nazipaan, ci Pi-sa-low pidemecan a kawaw atu mu-si-keay nu midemecay ci Ay-al-te-s malecad ku singangan. masakapahay a nikauzip Pi-sa-low lecuh i ayzaay a Si-pan-ya Ay-s-te-lye-ma-tu-la a kuwan nu adidi'ay a niyazu' Te-lu-si-lye "Trujillo", itawya Si-pan-ya ayaw nu nipapulung, u wama ci Kung-sa-Pi-sa-low.Low‚ÄĒte-li-ke-s.te.A-kuw-la "Gonzalo Pizarro Rodr√≠guez de Aguilar" u sakakaay nu muculilay a hitay, namikilul ci Bey-al-nan-te-s.te-ke-to-hwa atu milihiza tu nu I-ta-lai a kalalais, na i Na-wa-la a malalais, a sikawlah tu nikalalaisan. (Trujillo), (Gonzalo Pizarro Rodr√≠guez de Aguilar) . u bucud a wawa ci Pi-al-low, nisulitan cinizaan tu wawanay a mihcaan caay kayadah, katinengan wawana nikauzip niza mangelu' pakuyuc', asaca caay ka picudad, maliyuh misulit. i 1500 a ziday tu saayaway, ci Pi-sa-low naitiza i Say-wi-yw, zikuz mikaput tu Si-pan-ya nu mitahaway i bayu nu sakaput a balunga, kinapinaay tu mikawaw tu mitahaway, nabatad pabalunga' tayza i Si-ing-tu kasadipas a subal nu I-s-pa-ni-aw-la a subal, 1510 a mihcaan hawsa, sakukamu ciniza aci A-long-su.Te.Aw-he-ta namakay S-s-pan-niw-la a subal natayza i Urab. Urab. Pi-sa-low mikilul ci Pa-s-ke.ni-nye-c.Te-Pa-al-pow mapulung mitahaw tu satipbayu a liwliw nu subal, i Pa-na-ma mana'nel, mala malukay nu pahabanay tu katalalan. 1522 a mihcaan, cuniza atu kiwkay a siw-s ci Ay-al-nan-to.te.Lu-ke atu hitay ci Ti-ya-ke.te.A-ma-ke-low makakadum, makay Pa-na-ma tatimul mikilim tu yadahay a lala' nu midebungay, tatulu ku heni palalecad tu lala', sakapah sa micalap matatelek zikuz, malingatu sibalucu' makay bayu micumud tawyaay a liwliw nu In-Cya ti-kow. . i teban nu zazan miala misaupu tu sabaw tulu nu miladayay, pinaay ku nipalawpes tu bulad demiad, micakay tu subayu, kakaen atu kuwang, masaupu i ayzaay a Ke-lun-pi-ya satip a dadipasan nayay ku tademaw a subal, nayi' ku patiyamay, nayi' ku balunga, palatatenga' ci Pi-sa-low cinizaan namiduduc tu dadipasan a zazan pabalunga, micaliway tu In-Cya ti-kow a lala'. . yu taluma' i Pa-na-ma ciniza hawsa, Pa-na-ma a Cow-cang pasaicelang cinizaan a palalid mitahaw, pabeli cinizaan tu sayadahay a hitay atu subayu miazih tu zazan, 1528 a mihcaan tu kalalud, ci Pa-sa-low makay Pa-na-ma mumul, kalaludan taluma' i Say-wi-ya. itawya i Si-pang-ya-to-le-to a sen-sen-Low-ma-ti-kow hungti ci Ca-al sakalima lasubu a hungti sakay ci P-sa-lowan tu nitayzaan manamuhay, i 1529 a mihca 7 a bulad 26 a demiad macacudad a sitatungus a mademec ku Ing-Cya ti-kow. 1532 a mihcaan ci Pi-sa-low atu ciniza tu cayay ka katukuh tu tusa a lasubu nu adidi'ay sakaput a hitay tatimul, i zazanan paanin tu adidi'ay a tuud misulup a palatatenga' ku In-ti-an. 11 a bulad 16 a demiad tayni tu i Mi-lu nu saamisanay a Ka-ha-ka, tini i In-Cya a biyu miazih tu nipakaala nu cekakaan tu nipademecan nu In-cya a hungti ci A-ta-uw-al-pa, culculen niza ci A-al-nan-tu.te.Su-to, siw-s-wwon-sen-te-te-Ba-al-bu-te atu tizaay nu pabelinay ci Bey-li-pi-low tayza miazih tu hungti, anucaay sa a kasenun miliyas kuheni, In-cya a hungti caay ku mikilulay tu cimacimaan a tademaw. ŚĺĀśúćŚćįŚä† In-cya a hungti mataneng ku balucu' lalekalan i kalalaisan tu walu malebut a hitay nu In-cya, ni Pi-ce-low a hitay muculilay 106 dada' atu 62 nu cisubayuay a hitay, zikuz milais ci Pi-ce-low, Ka-ha-ma-ka milalais mademec tusa a malebut ku nisubelidan a kudih nu In-cya, mazakepay Ing-cya a hungti, atu hita 12 ku miadingay nu tademaw patayen tu. 1538 a mihcaan, u nikakilac tu nialawan a munday, nikelidan a hitay ni Pi-sa-low malawlaw ku lalabuay, azihan atu sakadum niza kacacayat a hitay ci Ti-ya-ke.te-A-ma-ke-low malingatu milalais cinizaan, itawya i Ute a tukay, mademec niza ci A-ma-ke-low, nika 1541 a mihca 6 a bulad 26 a demiad, i Li-ma a niyazu'an ciniza mapacuk nu mikilulay ni A-ma-ke-low. 1538ŚĻī, ,Áē∂śôāŚú®UteŚüé, . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
